title: Pintos Threads 구현 지도
subtitle: tests -> expected behavior -> code surface -> blanks to fill

items.title: alarm-*
items.body: alarm-single, multiple, simultaneous, priority, zero, negative

items.title: priority-*
items.body: preempt, change, fifo, sema, condvar

items.title: donate-*
items.body: one, multiple, nest, sema, lower, chain

items.title: mlfqs-*
items.body: load, recent_cpu, fair, nice, block

items.title: run order
items.body: alarm -> priority -> donation -> mlfqs

items.title: Sleep, not spin
items.body: timer_sleep blocks current thread until wake tick

items.title: Highest first
items.body: ready and waiter lists choose max effective priority

items.title: Priority donation
items.body: blocked high-priority thread boosts lock holder

items.title: Dynamic priority
items.body: priority comes from recent_cpu, nice, load_avg

items.title: Yield points
items.body: new or unblocked higher-priority thread should run soon

items.title: timer.c
items.body: timer_sleep(), timer_interrupt(), global sleep queue

items.title: thread.c
items.body: ready_list, thread_unblock(), thread_yield(), next_thread_to_run()

items.title: synch.c
items.body: sema_down/up, lock_acquire/release, cond_wait/signal

items.title: thread.h
items.body: struct thread fields for sleep, donation, mlfqs

items.title: interrupt.c
items.body: intr_yield_on_return for interrupt-safe preemption

items.title: Alarm fields
items.body: wake tick + separate list element for sleepers

items.title: Priority helpers
items.body: effective priority comparator and ready-list insertion

items.title: Donation fields
items.body: base priority, donor list, waiting lock, held lock relation

items.title: MLFQS fields
items.body: nice, recent_cpu, load_avg and recalculation cadence

items.title: Test checkpoint
items.body: pass one group before moving to the next group
